name: pr_cep_expoverflow
drl: rule R when E() then end
_finding: Expiration deadline i64/long OVERFLOW: ts near MAX + expires_ms wraps NEGATIVE in two's-complement on BOTH sides, feeding the same negative-deadline guard (engine D-133 branch = DROOLS-455 effectiveEnd<0 -> Long.MAX_VALUE) => the overflow event never expires while the ts=0 control expires normally past its deadline. Pins wrap-faithfulness against a hypothetical Java-side addExact/clamp asymmetry (adversarial-surface pass on v0.4.4).
